misc.title: #ONEPIECE I also wouldn't mind if Oda uses Sigurd, The Dragon Slayer of Norse Mythology, as Zoro's Opponent in Elbalf. Sigurd would have his famed blade, Gram & he'd probably be the Strongest Swordsma
misc.text: #ONEPIECE I also wouldn't mind if Oda uses Sigurd, The Dragon Slayer of Norse Mythology, as Zoro's Opponent in Elbalf. Sigurd would have his famed blade, Gram & he'd probably be the Strongest Swordsman of Elbalf. Zoro would definitely challenge him. 🤔 (Wishful thinking tho) MistaZod 👑👾 | PATIENCE | Mr. Zodiac | (@MistaZod) #ONEPIECE Elbalf Matchups I hope come True Luffy vs Thor(God of Thunder/Possible Prince Loki Enemy(Arc Prince)) Ussop vs Goliath(Slingshot David vs Giant Biblical Story) Zoro vs Fafnir(Sigurd with his cursed sword Gram vs Fafnir, The Dragon. Western Dragon Zoan User?) — https://nitter.net/MistaZod/status/1818139695827611825#m

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1189] WE FOUND THE Xingtian Axe that Imu is using from one of the 19 kings that Imu is using!!!! It was in the throne room on the left side of Imu , behind two swords!!
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1189] WE FOUND THE Xingtian Axe that Imu is using from one of the 19 kings that Imu is using!!!! It was in the throne room on the left side of Imu , behind two swords!!

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1189 Gaban is so fast: He leaps between Luffy and Imu, blocking Imu’s axe, and the chapter ends with their axes clashing, I can feel it, Gaban’s big moment is just around the corner... But I
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1189 Gaban is so fast: He leaps between Luffy and Imu, blocking Imu’s axe, and the chapter ends with their axes clashing, I can feel it, Gaban’s big moment is just around the corner... But I also fear for Gaban’s life; he bears all the signs of death flags...😭

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1189 When we look at all the weapons, could Nemesis actually be the only Black Blade that Imu possesses (inherited from a previous king or his own weapon)? Since he summons it, that implies i
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1189 When we look at all the weapons, could Nemesis actually be the only Black Blade that Imu possesses (inherited from a previous king or his own weapon)? Since he summons it, that implies it could be a Black Blade like the ones Mihawk or Ryuma wielded, right?

misc.title: #ONEPIECE1189 Sommers gets the sword, Kilingham the spear, Luffy wings facing opponents with a sword and spear... Luffy's wings are his weapon, everything make sense...🙌
misc.text: #ONEPIECE1189 Sommers gets the sword, Kilingham the spear, Luffy wings facing opponents with a sword and spear... Luffy's wings are his weapon, everything make sense...🙌

misc.title: 菓匠 川村屋 鳥山明先生のサインがあるという情報をキャッチしたので行ってきました😆 店員さんがめちゃくちゃ親切で、このお店に鳥山先生のサインがある経緯も伺うことができました🥹 写真撮り忘れましたが、塩飴やらキーホルダーもいただいちゃいました☺️ #ドラゴンボール #DRAGONBALL #鳥山明
